name: Claimable Tasks
description: Task claiming system with admin grading workflow
details: A task system where users can claim unclaimed tasks and submit work for admin review. Demonstrates 'unclaimed-or-own' permission level, writableFields for restricting which fields non-admins can update, and timestampTrigger for automatic timestamp fields.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { challengesSchema } from './schemas/tasks-schema'
Add to App.tsx: import TasksPage from './pages/TasksPage'
patterns: update: 'unclaimed-or-own' → claim unclaimed OR update own
